-- Rename conflicting columns and add ASSAY columns to the existing users table
-- First check what's there and add missing columns

ALTER TABLE `users`
  MODIFY COLUMN `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `email` VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `name` TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `status` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  ADD COLUMN `password_hash` TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `google_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `organization_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `last_active_at` DATETIME(3) NULL;
